01222121120020100011110220210200 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  011 = 01 * 1
  102 = 10 * 2
  200 = 20 * 0
  0011 = 0 * 011
  0122 = 01 * 22
  0200 = 0 * 200
  1102 = 1 * 102
  1200 = 1 * 200
  2010 = 20 * 10
  2021 = 20 * 21
  2121 = 21 * 21
  00111102 = 0011 * 1102
  01222121 = 0122 * 2121
  12002010 = 1200 * 2010
  20210200 = 2021 * 0200
  0011110220210200 = 00111102 * 20210200
  0122212112002010 = 01222121 * 12002010
  01222121120020100011110220210200 = 0122212112002010 * 0011110220210200
